feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: List of field changes in Transactions when migrating from ECC to S4
entry.content: When migrating from ECC to S4, the screens for most transactions have remained the same but there are some where the fields have been moved around the screen for a different layout.  I like to know if anyone has a compiled list of field changes to some of these transactions.

entry.title: Query about HR loans (infotype 45)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if it is possible to suspend a loa (infotype 45) for a period of time without having to pay it off and create a new one with the remaining amount.

entry.title: Availibility Check in STO Partially Shipped
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I am transferring materials between 2 plants in the same company code. I am using an STO. I create an STO to transfer 10 pieces. When the STO gets created I do not have the material available. I manufacture 5 pieces. A job runs and creates  an outbound delivery for 5 pieces. The goods issue is posted. An inbound delivery gets created and received at the destination. Then I manufacture 5 more pieces. The job runs and no outbound delivery gets created. Even if I try manually creating the outbound delivery in VL10B, it does not work. I get an message informing that there are no schedule lines due. If I enter in the STO in change mode and run the availability check again manually the outbound delivery for the remaining 5 pieces gets created by the job. Is this the standard behavior? Is there any program that we can schedule to keep running availability check for outbound deliveries automatically? 

Thanks in advance,

Mauricio

entry.title: ODBC Connection Between SAP ECC and Excel
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I am wondering if it is possible to connect Excel to the SAP ECC 6.0 Database using ODBC and how to do it.

I know it is possible in S/4 HANA. I remember once installing an ADD-ON to Excel, establishing a connection using a user and a password and being able to use some datasets in Excel. 

Any advice would be really appreciated. 

Thanks in advance,

Mauricio

entry.title: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
We have been observing high memory usage on SAP PERSON_NAME production system since yesterday.
Pool/PersistenceManager/PersistentSpace/DefaultLPA/LOBPage is around 66 GB now and it is increasing every hour.
 
Our current PERSON_NAME version is '2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER'
Attaching output of "HANA_Memory_TopConsumers_TimeSlices_2.00.043+", "HANA_LOBs_DiskLOBs_2.00.040+.txt".
 

Please let us know how to stop the growing memory and bring down high memory usage on PERSON_NAME.
 Let us know what is causing the growth of LOB pages?

Thanks,
Chaitanya

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Installation

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A...(truncated)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Getting BS001 error while converting planned order to Process order "No status object exists for POR
entry.content:
Getting BS001 error while converting planned order to Process order "

No status object exists for POR 10010991376/6

 

just want to know which program should I run in SE38 to resolve this error.

 

regards

entry.title: startsap r3 No instance profiles found
entry.content:
While starting the application server, we encountered the following error:

startsap r3: No instance profiles found.

The trace file can be found at /home/prdadm/startsap.trc. Please share this file with support for further investigation.

Additionally, we are facing the following issues:

  • The Dispatcher is not starting on the DVEBMGS00 application server.
  • The Message Server is not starting when attempting to start the ASCS01 instance.

entry.title: SAP Joule
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently supporting a client from the German SME sector who is using the SAP ERP system SAP ECC (Enterprise Core Component) and is planning a transition to the SAP Cloud. It is still unclear whether this will be implemented as an on-premise or private cloud solution. My role involves developing an AI strategy for the After-Sales and IT departments, with the goal (for the IT department) to improve data interaction and processes within the ERP system and therefore across all departments.

I have heard about SAP Joule and would like to understand how this system could integrate into my client’s existing structure. Additionally, I am interested in how advanced the solution currently is, the requirements for data preparation, and how Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is supported. Currently, data maintenance is not in a format suitable for AI applications, which is a key factor in our planning.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

entry.title: How to see Packing Instruction POP2 Change History
entry.content:
Hi 

I am check Packing Instruction in POP2. It seems  target quantity has been changed. We need to identify it what value was changed. As it is new material so We dont have existing data for it.  we can see last change date and user but can not see the list

Could you advise how to see change history in POP2 for value

 

Regards

RK

entry.title: Batch Determination with FEFO in STO
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I have a requierement to activate FEFO in STO (PO with UB type), The FEFO strategy is already created and activated for transfers via MIGO, but in STO  I don't know if it's possible or not 

Could you please help 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Risk category update on released documents
entry.content:
Hello,
After changing the risk category in credit master we are running the RVKRED09 but risk category is not getting updated to the delivery when credit status is "D". we need a solution so when risk category is changed still system can update the new risk category to the released deliveries and stop the further processing


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Joule Capabilities
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently supporting a client from the German SME sector who is using the SAP ERP system SAP ECC (Enterprise Core Component) and is planning a transition to the SAP Cloud. It is still unclear whether this will be implemented as an on-premise or private cloud solution. My role involves developing an AI strategy for the After-Sales and IT departments, with the goal (for the IT department) to improve data interaction and processes within the ERP system and therefore across all departments.

I have heard about SAP Joule and would like to understand how this system could integrate into my client’s existing structure. Additionally, I am interested in how advanced the solution currently is, the requirements for data preparation, and how Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is supported. Currently, data maintenance is not in a format suitable for AI applications, which is a key factor in our planning.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

entry.title: Reconcile FI-AA with New GL after a New GL migration with change in depraciation area
entry.content:
We have performed a New GL migration, in which a depreciation area (taxes), that was formerly (i.e. in classic GL and FI_AA) non-posting, has turned into an area, which is directly posting into a Tax-Ledger. In the migration for the tax ledger the depreciation accounts were filled with the same values as for the leading depreciation area. This leads to some differences in the tax ledger in ABTS2.

How can we correct these differences?

entry.title: How to upgrade SAP BR*Tools
entry.content:
How to patch/upgrade SAP BR*Tools.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: AFAB ERROR - Asset under AUC changed DepKey to '0000' yet error still persist
entry.content:
• Wrong Depreciation Key Assigned: Initially, a depreciation key that calculates depreciation was incorrectly assigned to an asset created under AUC asset class.
    Normally, AUCs should not be depreciated until they are capitalized.

  • Depreciation Run Error: During the May depreciation run, the accumulated depreciation GL account was not set as a reconciliation account. This caused the depreciation posting to fail in the GL, but it was still reflected in the asset subledger (Asset Explorer). It prompts the following errors:

  • Change in Depreciation Key to '0000': In Nov, I corrected this by updating the depreciation key to '0000' (no depreciation), but the system still reflects the depreciation from May because the error was not resolved, and no restart of depreciation was successfully executed.

  • Error During Restart: When attempting to restart depreciation for May, the error AU133 still occurs because the accumulated depreciation account is missing in the account determination for area 01

 

Please advise how to resolve this error.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: AFAB ERROR - Asset under AUC changed DepKey to '0000' yet error still persist
entry.content:
• Wrong Depreciation Key Assigned: Initially, a depreciation key that calculates depreciation was incorrectly assigned to an asset created under AUC asset class.
    Normally, AUCs should not be depreciated until they are capitalized.

  • Depreciation Run Error: During the May depreciation run, the accumulated depreciation GL account was not set as a reconciliation account. This caused the depreciation posting to fail in the GL, but it was still reflected in the asset subledger (Asset Explorer). It prompts the following errors:

     

     

  • Change in Depreciation Key to '0000': In Nov, I corrected this by updating the depreciation key to '0000' (no depreciation), but the system still reflects the depreciation from May because the error was not resolved, and no restart of depreciation was successfully executed.

  • Error During Restart: When attempting to restart depreciation for May, the error AU133 still occurs because the accumulated depreciation account is missing in the account determination for area 01

 

Please advise how to resolve this error.

 

Thanks in advance.

Labels:

entry.title: 3rd Party extension in SAP system (DABEXP 140)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying to establish which SAP module / team is utlising a particular add-on. The add on is DABEXP 140 and it was identified in our SAP readiness report. We are moving for ECC 6 to S/4HANA and this add on was under the heading: "Add-ons which are Certified Third-Party Software Available". 

No one seems to know what this add on is for. How do I get to the bottom of this? All I know is this is the vendor's website: https://www.dab-europe.com/

@everyone 

Kind Regards

Michelle

entry.title: setting of period control method for depreciation key
entry.content:
Hi,

We have business requirement for Asset Depreciation as follows. -

General Ledger Setting:

General Ledger 0L - Fiscal year variant (K4) for IFRS

General Ledger 1L - Fiscal Year Variant(V3) for Local Tax

General Ledger 2L - Fiscal Year Variant(K4)  for Asset Local Tax

Ledger Group (TL) : 2L (leading Ledger) , 1L 

----

Asset Depreciation Area (01) : for 0L

Asset Depreciation Area (03): for 2L

For depreciation area 03, we hope to use the concept of V3 to calculate depreciation

e.g. acquired Date: 20240701 , we want to start calculating depreciation from 202404

      acquired date:202503 , we want to start calculating depreciation from 202409,

For Period control, how can we set?

entry.title: userexit_save_document_prepare
entry.content:
When entering material in VA01, where in the Sales order the material details are saved in VA01 before saving the Sales order.

  • I need to block some materials based on some validations in VA01.

entry.title: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in SAP maintained table
entry.content:
Do SAP consider changes made in T Code: BS22 as custom modifications or SAP allows customers to make changes in this SAP Maintained table and consider it as Standard configuration?

I0045 TECO Technically completed

Standard setup provided for TECO is that a TECO'ed Production Order cannot be used in a Purchase Order.

But Business want to use a TECO Production Order in a Purchase Order, and to achieve this we should change the standard setting from "Forbidden" to "Allowed" in BS22.

I want to know whether this is allowed by SAP or do SAP consider this as custom modification and will stop supporting in this area after we make this change.
